---
title: "Sangam Basnet"
image: media/basnets_profile1.png
2toc: false
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 13em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sangam-basnet-mph-78849b131/
      icon: linkedin
    - text: Email
      href: sangambasnet03@gmail.com
      icon: envelope
---

## About me
I am currently a public health expert at Rural Reconstruction Nepal where I have been worked on some stuff, which has resulted in... I also have had worked on some monitoring and evaluation stuff... I have a strong background in qualitative methods... I have an interest in understanding how we can improve mental health through implementation science... yeah I'm pretty awesome.
